title: Owlume Bias Signature (v1)
description: Schema for a BSE bias signature record — the cognitive fingerprint of a user or sender's recurring reasoning distortions.

entity_hash.description: Privacy-preserving SHA-256 hash of the entity identifier. Raw identifier never stored.

entity_type.description: sender = outward-facing fraud detection. user = inward-facing Owlume reflection.

reasoning_vector.description: Weighted vector of reasoning distortion signals accumulated over time.

mode_distribution.description: Frequency distribution of detected modes across scans.

principle_distribution.description: Frequency distribution of detected principles across scans.

driver_distribution.description: Frequency distribution of detected context drivers across scans.

pattern_distribution.description: Frequency distribution of detected fraud patterns across scans.

human_marker_absence_rate.description: Rate at which human reasoning markers are absent. High = synthetic.

avg_confidence.description: Rolling average detection confidence across all scans.

signal_distribution.description: Distribution of RED/YELLOW/GREEN signals across scans.

signature_ids.description: Matched bias signature IDs from bias_signature_catalog.json.

temporal_drift.description: How the reasoning vector has shifted over time. Detects evolving fraud tactics.

bse_signal.description: Derived BSE signal from accumulated reasoning vector.

confidence_adjustment.description: Confidence delta applied to new scans from this sender. Positive = boost RED. Negative = reduce RED.
